programmes.show_description: Coast To Coast Chow. Guy Fieri is in Charleston to sample chicken fried biscuit and shrimps. In Chicago, he visits a well-loved eatery that serves up German specialities. S14, Ep13
Seafood And Sammies. Guy Fieri is in Vancouver, Detroit and then Chicago to try America's best surf and turf sandwiches. He has oysters, brisket and meatballs on this whirlwind trip. S13, Ep1
Ozark Mountains. Casey Webb travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes. S2, Ep13
Nashville, TN. Casey Webb heads to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet - three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce. S2, Ep14
Big Beast, Brownie Blunders & Back To Baking. Buddy goes global when he is asked to make a Merlion, the mythical beast that's half lion, half fish for Singapore's 50th birthday. S7, Ep9
High Tea and Hot Rods. Buddy and the guys are feeling rather sophisticated as they make a cake for a couple of expats celebrating the upcoming birth of the royal baby, Charlotte. S7, Ep10

Teleshopping.
Eurocentric. Guy Fieri finds an Eastern European joint heating up a hearty hangover soup and meat dish. Then, a Polish eatery serves up potato pancakes with savoury stew. S16, Ep9
Real Deal Roots. Guy Fieri is exploring dishes with a personal connection. In Los Angeles, a food truck infuses Singaporean flavours into chili crab cake and lamb burger. S16, Ep13
Passin' The Baton. Guy Fieri is in California to check out a breakfast place that serves up pancake burritos. In Baltimore, he visits a Greek eatery with a history. S14, Ep4
All Vegas, All The Time. Guy Fieri is in Buffalo where a Bulgarian tapas bar serves up European comfort food. Then, Guy cooks with the newest crop of culinary talent. S14, Ep8
All Change. Ina is in Brooklyn where she checks out new twists on old classics. She visits the Mile End Deli where they're modernising chopped liver and she makes bratwurst. S9, Ep4
Fun In The City. Ina gets to cook in two incredible New York restaurants. At John Dory Oyster Bar she learns the secret to making oyster pan roast and uni butter crostini. S9, Ep5
Cooking With Giada. Ina invites Giada De Laurentiis round for a day of cooking together. They enjoy lobster and potato salad for lunch and then Giada makes a delicious gnocchi dish. S9, Ep6
Cooking With Tyler Florence. Ina has a cooking date with chef Tyler Florence. They bake a birthday cake together and visit the local farm scene to pick up vegetables and chicken. S9, Ep7
Cooking With Michael Symon. Ina and Michael Symon cook a Greek feast. He makes delicious smoked pork ribs on the grill whilst she whips up the side dishes, like spicy hummus. S9, Ep8
Barefoot Chocolate Desserts. Ina makes her favourite chocolate desserts from the Barefoot Contessa hall of fame. She makes cupcakes with peanut butter frosting and chocolate gelato. S9, Ep9
With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep4
Jamie serves lasagne with roasted duck and shows his take on everybody's favourite, bacon sarnie. Plus, makes some delicious huevos rancheros. S1, Ep7
Jamie prepares the ultimate comfort food with his version of the British classic, fish and chips. And, he gives Indonesian gado gado salad a vegetarian twist. S1, Ep8
Mid Wales. James explores Mid Wales, joined by Michelin-starred chef Gareth Ward. The trip includes Welsh Mountain cider tasting and a decadent Welsh rarebit. S1, Ep9
The Peak District. James's trip continues in the stunning scenery of the Peak District. He's joined by cooking legend, Tessa Bramley, and cooks up a tasty beef stew. S1, Ep10
Glasgow. Dave and Si continue their adventure in Glasgow, on the hunt for new ingredients to include on the menu of a Scottish-Malaysian fusion restaurant. S1, Ep2
Cotswolds. Si and Dave continue their adventure in the Cotswolds, where they search for new ingredients to include on a high-end, ten-course tasting menu. S1, Ep3
Fife. Dave and Si continue their adventure on the east coast of Scotland, on the hunt for new, local ingredients to include on a menu at a beachfront café. S1, Ep4
Norfolk. The Bikers head to Norfolk, one of their favourite parts of the world. They hunt for ingredients for a country pub chef with a creative streak. S1, Ep5
With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep4
Jamie serves lasagne with roasted duck and shows his take on everybody's favourite, bacon sarnie. Plus, makes some delicious huevos rancheros. S1, Ep7
Jamie prepares the ultimate comfort food with his version of the British classic, fish and chips. And, he gives Indonesian gado gado salad a vegetarian twist. S1, Ep8
Decadent Dishes. Guy Fieri is on the hunt for decadent dishes. He uncovers a joint that serves up fried chicken and waffles, a spicy pulled pork sandwich, and a daily donut. S16, Ep8
Layers Of Flavor. Guy Fieri is firing up the grill. In Toronto, a restored diner is cooking up pork belly and a mac and cheese burger. Then, Guy tries Jamaican jerk chicken. S16, Ep12
Crankin' Up The Classics. Guy Fieri is in Minneapolis to check out an Italian deli that serves pizza and fresh pasta. In Dallas, he meets Ear Campbell for gumbo and burgers. S14, Ep3
BBQ Road Show. Guy Fieri is in Dallas where he samples classic beef brisket and Carolina pork. In Las Vegas, he visits a meat market where he eats fresh sausages. S14, Ep7
Coast-To-Coast Classics. Guy Fieri drives all over the country to try some of the nation's best joints. In Vancouver, he tries roast beef and Yorkshire pudding with a French dip. S13, Ep2
Kid Rock's Detroit Tour. Guy Fieri takes Kid Rock on a culinary tour through Detroit. First, they have mac and cheese in a renovated church. After they try a mammoth sandwich. S13, Ep3
Dynamic Dishes. Guy is looking for truly unique eats. In Honolulu, a Jamaican eatery is serving jerk chicken wings and goat curry. Then, it's potato pancakes stuffed with beef. S14, Ep12
Eurocentric. Guy Fieri finds an Eastern European joint heating up a hearty hangover soup and meat dish. Then, a Polish eatery serves up potato pancakes with savoury stew. S16, Ep9
Tennessee Holiday Traditions. Guy Fieri samples Tennessee's holiday traditions. In Hendersonville a barbecue joint serves up shoulder pull and a holiday ham with a fiery finish. S18, Ep11
Chicken, Chili, And Chowder. Guy Fieri visits a Burbank chilli spot dating back a century, a Philadelphia gourmet bar food joint cranking out clam chowder and a Toronto smokehouse. S17, Ep2
Real Deal Roots. Guy Fieri is exploring dishes with a personal connection. In Los Angeles, a food truck infuses Singaporean flavours into chili crab cake and lamb burger. S16, Ep13
Passin' The Baton. Guy Fieri is in California to check out a breakfast place that serves up pancake burritos. In Baltimore, he visits a Greek eatery with a history. S14, Ep4

Hittin' The Grill. Guy Fieri is sampling foods straight off the grill. In Tacoma, the pub grub grill menu includes a take on killer kabobs and homegrown beet salads. S16, Ep10
Triple D All Stars. Host Guy Fieri is on the road with a couple of his A-list friends: Matthew McConaughey and fellow foodie Andrew Zimmern. S14, Ep1
Big Time Flavor. Guy Fieri is in Dallas to visit a Neapolitan pizza place that serves pizza with bacon jam. Then, in Austin, he samples chicken burgers in a tiny café. S14, Ep5
Serious Sandwiches. Guy Fieri is in Austin to visit a gourmet sandwich shop that serves duck pastrami sandwiches. In Las Vegas, he tries roast beef po'bo done the Cajun way. S14, Ep9
Philadelphia, PA. Casey Webb is in Philadelphia for the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions. S2, Ep5
Los Angeles, CA. Casey Webb is in Los Angeles to take on a massive burrito packed with every ingredient from the kitchen and soaked in a sauce 600 times hotter than a jalapeno. S2, Ep7
Pittsburgh, Pa. Casey Webb visits Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania to try the traditional perogies. Plus, he tackles an enormous five-pound sandwich stuffed with meat, fries and coleslaw. S2, Ep9
Boise, ID. Casey Webb is in Boise, Idaho to sample their burger celebrations and potato innovations. Plus, he takes on a diabolically spicy challenge known as Demon's Delight. S2, Ep11
Ozark Mountains. Casey Webb travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes. S2, Ep13
Seattle, WA. Casey Webb travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers. S2, Ep6
San Diego, CA. Casey Webb travels to San Diego, California in search of the city's best food. Plus, he takes on a monster 5.5-pound pancake stack with ham, steak, bacon and sausage. S2, Ep8
Daytona Beach, Fl. Casey Webb travels to Daytona Beach, Florida, to take on an epic four-pound surf and turf sandwich, packed with two burgers and six pieces of mahi mahi. S2, Ep10
Grand Rapids, MI. Casey Webb visits Grand Rapids in Michigan, a city famous for its beer, to indulge in a hot dish, a saucy burrito and a five-pound chilli dog challenge. S2, Ep12
Nashville, TN. Casey Webb heads to Tennessee, where he faces his hottest challenge yet - three jumbo chicken tenders smothered in a Carolina Reaper-infused sauce. S2, Ep14
Yorkshire Dales. James returns home to his native Yorkshire. He's joined by friend and award-winning chef, Brian Turner as he tries some clay pigeon shooting. S1, Ep11
The Lake District. James's journey brings him to Cumbria. He's joined by top Michelin-starred chef, Clare Smyth, for a leg that includes a trip out on Lake Windermere. S1, Ep12
Britain's best amateur bakers compete in the iconic white tent! Who will struggle under pressure and who will impress judges, Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith? S12, Ep9
Britain's best amateur bakers compete in the iconic white tent! Who will struggle under pressure and who will impress judges, Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith? S12, Ep10
Cake Week. It's cake week, and the brand-new batch of bakers tackle mini cakes, a striking sponge and a scaled-down version of a home close to their hearts. S13, Ep1
Biscuit Week. The bakers tackle illusion macarons and a fruity favourite, before unleashing their creativity by making a dramatic 3D mask entirely from biscuits. S13, Ep2
Eton Mess. Adam samples the famous Eton Mess in Eton. He also enjoys afternoon tea fit for a Royal in Windsor, samples venison in bon-bon bar snacks and makes some tasty fudge. S1, Ep5
Glamorgan Sausage. In Wales, Adam tries Glamorgan sausage in Glamorgan. He enjoys Welsh rarebit and wonderful Welsh cakes, and bites into his Polish heritage with pierogis. S1, Ep6
Jamie serves lasagne with roasted duck and shows his take on everybody's favourite, bacon sarnie. Plus, makes some delicious huevos rancheros. S1, Ep7
Jamie prepares the ultimate comfort food with his version of the British classic, fish and chips. And, he gives Indonesian gado gado salad a vegetarian twist. S1, Ep8
James travels along the stunning Antrim coast and glens of Northern Ireland. Local boy Paul Rankin joins him to brave the Carrick-a-Rede rope bridge. S1, Ep15
